# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot-config:
  repositories:
    s3:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: my-backup-bucket
        region: us-east-1
        access_key_id: "AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE"
        secret_access_key: "wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYzEXAMPLEKEY"
    file-share:
      type: fs
      settings:
        location: /backups
  snapshot_interval: 1h
  retention_policy:
    min_count: 3
    max_age: 14d
  notification:
    email:
      recipients: [ops@example.com]
      send_failure: true
